title: Ordering Coffee at a Café
summary: A short dialogue at a café — basic greetings, ordering, prices.
script:
Server: Hi! Good morning. How can I help you?
Customer: Good morning. I would like a coffee, please.
Server: A small or a large coffee?
Customer: A large one. With milk, please.
Server: Anything to eat?
Customer: Yes, a croissant.
Server: That's four dollars fifty.
Customer: Here you are. Five dollars.
Server: Thank you. Here is your change, fifty cents. Have a nice day!
Customer: You too. Thanks!

questions.q: What does the customer order to drink?
What food does the customer order?
How much does the order cost?
How much change does the customer receive?
